arts.ttl: Besiktas 'express' transfer interest in Leeds United man amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: It is a big for United as Firpo has nailed down the left back spot in 2024. There is no sign yet of Firpo extending his United stay.

arts.ttl: Different Elland Road challenge expected as 'difficult' Leeds United prediction made
arts.sum: Middlesbrough boss Michael Carrick knows his side will come up against a very different Leeds United in tonight's Championship clash - but he is relishing the 'great challenge'. Former Manchester United midfielder Carrick is expecting a tough test tonight and admits that while that Carabao Cup result will count for little, it does add an extra element to the occasions.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United boss Chris Wilder snaps back at 'lazy' claim involving Leeds United and Burnley
arts.sum: Given how well Sheffield United, Leeds United and Burnley have performed in the first half of the campaign, it has led to sports broadcaster Richard Keys claiming the parachute payments system creates an unlevel playing field in the second tier of English football. Chris Wilder has branded the suggestion that Sheffield United's success this season is based on receiving Premier League parachute payments as "absolute nonsense".

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick issues prediction for Leeds United v Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Leeds United host promotion hopefuls Middlesbrough this evening at Elland Road with both sides looking to make a statement in the automatic promotion race. Michael Carrick’s Middlesbrough are up next at Elland Road, a side sitting seven back from Leeds as things stand, but growing into the season with an upturn in form since November.

arts.ttl: Leeds United v Middlesbrough TV channel, kick-off time and live stream info
arts.sum: Leeds United host Middlesbrough in a mouth-watering Championship clash this evening - but is the match on TV and how can you follow all of the action?

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder hits back at “lazy” Richard Keys comment on Leeds United and Sheffield United
arts.sum: Richard Keys blasts Championship parachute payments for Leeds, Sheffield United and Burnley Leeds United’s relative strength compared to most of the rest of the Championship has been a common topic of discussion, helped significantly by the club’s relegation and parachute payments.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Middlesbrough with four changes and two forwards axed
arts.sum: Brenden Aaronson looks like someone who needs to be taken out of the team for their own good now. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Neil Harris to step down as Millwall boss after Middlesbrough match
arts.sum: Harris’ second spell in charge will come to an end after two more matches.

arts.ttl: 3 players who must look to leave Leeds United when the January transfer window opens
arts.sum: Leeds United are in a good place heading into the hectic festive schedule and immediately after, a crucial… The post 3 players who must look to leave Leeds United when the January transfer window opens appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Richard Keys namechecks Leeds United, Sheffield United and Burnley in parachute payments rant
arts.sum: The Whites will be chasing back-to-back Championship wins when they resume their promotion bid at home to Middlesbrough this evening. Sports presenter Richard Keys has referenced Sheffield United, Leeds United and Burnley in his criticism of the parachute payments system.
